minimum_permissions: Least-privilege IAM for EC2 RunInstances or ECS/Fargate task/service creation plus PassRole when needed
create_endpoint_or_sdk: EC2 RunInstances API or ECS CreateService/RegisterTaskDefinition
deploy_flow: Create IAM principal; create VPC/security group/key pair or task execution role; call RunInstances for VM or RegisterTaskDefinition/CreateService for container; poll DescribeInstances or DescribeServices
rollback_or_delete_flow: TerminateInstances for VM; UpdateService/rollback task definition or DeleteService for ECS
notes: Use AWS Price List API separately for price lookup; never store root account keys.

minimum_permissions: Contributor scoped to resource group or narrower VM/container app permissions
create_endpoint_or_sdk: Azure Compute Virtual Machines Create/Update or Azure Container Apps create
deploy_flow: Create service principal; assign role on resource group; create resource group/network resources; call VM create/update or Container Apps API; poll provisioningState
rollback_or_delete_flow: Delete VM/resource group or redeploy previous image/revision
notes: Retail Prices API is unauthenticated, but deploy APIs require Entra auth.

minimum_permissions: Compute Instance Admin v1 plus Service Account User for VM; Cloud Run Admin plus Service Account User for container
create_endpoint_or_sdk: Compute Engine instances.insert or Cloud Run services.create
deploy_flow: Create service account; grant minimal IAM; enable API; call instances.insert for VM or Cloud Run service create for container; poll operation/service status
rollback_or_delete_flow: Delete instance/service or update Cloud Run traffic to previous revision
notes: Pricing API often requires billing account/IAM; public pricing table can be used for raw research.

minimum_permissions: Token scopes for droplet/app create and read; restrict token lifecycle manually
create_endpoint_or_sdk: Droplets API create or App Platform create app
deploy_flow: Create PAT; choose region/size/image; POST /v2/droplets for VM or POST /v2/apps for App Platform; poll action/app deployment
rollback_or_delete_flow: Destroy droplet; create rollback deployment or update app spec
notes: Sizes API endpoint documents price_hourly/price_monthly but API calls require bearer token.

auth_method: RAM user access key or STS token
minimum_permissions: RAM policy for ECS RunInstances or ECI create container group; PassRole if attaching roles
create_endpoint_or_sdk: ECS RunInstances or Elastic Container Instance CreateContainerGroup
deploy_flow: Create RAM user/role; grant ECS/ECI permissions; select region/vswitch/security group/image; call RunInstances or CreateContainerGroup; poll instance/container state
rollback_or_delete_flow: DeleteInstance or DeleteContainerGroup; redeploy previous image/config
notes: Price lookup can use pricing module APIs but may require account context.

minimum_permissions: CAM policy for CVM RunInstances or TKE/SCF resources as needed
deploy_flow: Create CAM user; grant CVM permissions; choose region/zone/image/instance type/security group; call RunInstances; poll DescribeInstances
notes: RunInstances may freeze prepaid/pay-as-you-go balance before creation.

create_endpoint_or_sdk: modal deploy or Modal Python SDK app/function definitions
deploy_flow: Install modal; authenticate token; define App and @app.function or web endpoint; run modal deploy; invoke deployed function or web URL
rollback_or_delete_flow: Deploy previous app version or delete/stop app from dashboard/CLI
notes: Best for Python-first serverless jobs, APIs, and GPU inference.

minimum_permissions: Token with Inference Endpoints permission for user/org
deploy_flow: Create HF token; ensure subscription/payment; call create endpoint with repository, provider, region, instance type, autoscaling; wait until deployed
rollback_or_delete_flow: Pause/scale to zero/delete endpoint or create new revision
notes: Endpoint creation requires account eligibility and payment method.

deploy_flow: Package model with Cog or select model version; create deployment with hardware and min/max instances; call predictions endpoint
rollback_or_delete_flow: Update deployment version/config or DELETE deployment
notes: Private deployments may bill idle online instances.

minimum_permissions: Site deploy permission; team/site scoped token when possible
create_endpoint_or_sdk: Netlify deploy API or CLI deploy
deploy_flow: Create/import site; build project; upload ZIP/files via deploy API or run CLI; poll deploy status until ready
rollback_or_delete_flow: Restore previous deploy or delete deploy/site
notes: API deploy limits apply; production deploys consume usage credits.

minimum_permissions: Project/team deploy permission; environment variable read/write only if needed
deploy_flow: Create access token; link project/team; send files/git source/build output to deployments endpoint; poll deployment status; assign alias/production target
rollback_or_delete_flow: Promote previous deployment, rollback via deployment alias, or delete deployment
notes: REST API supports deployments, aliases, projects, env vars, and teams.

deploy_flow: Create API key; call create project with region/Postgres version/settings; read connection URI; apply migrations
rollback_or_delete_flow: Delete project/branch or restore from branch/backup depending plan
notes: Use branch-per-environment for previews when suitable.

minimum_permissions: Org project create permission; project API key access for runtime separately
deploy_flow: Create PAT; choose org/region/db password/plan options; POST create project; wait for healthy; run migrations/config
rollback_or_delete_flow: Pause/delete project or restore from backups; redeploy edge functions separately
notes: Do not confuse Management API PAT with project anon/service_role keys.

minimum_permissions: Firebase Admin/Hosting Admin and required Google Cloud IAM
deploy_flow: Create Firebase project/site; create Hosting version; upload files; finalize version; release version to site/channel
rollback_or_delete_flow: Rollback to previous release or delete channel/version
notes: Before first Hosting REST deploy, project must have a default Hosting site.

auth_method: Public/private API key digest auth or service account
minimum_permissions: Project Cluster Manager or narrower custom role
deploy_flow: Create API keys; create/get project; call create cluster with provider/region/instance size; configure network access and database users
rollback_or_delete_flow: Delete cluster or scale down/update cluster config; restore from snapshot if enabled
notes: Network access and DB users are separate from cluster creation.

create_endpoint_or_sdk: Railway public GraphQL API mutations or railway up
deploy_flow: Create token; create/select project/environment/service; deploy from repo/image/local with CLI or GraphQL workflow; monitor deployment logs/status
rollback_or_delete_flow: Rollback to previous deployment or remove service/environment
notes: Railway API is GraphQL; docs recommend learning GraphQL flow first.
